en: It's hard to believe I'm still lonely Chances fading now, patience running out
ko: 여전히 외롭다는 게 믿기 힘들어 기회는 사라지고, 인내는 바닥나가

en: This ain't how it's supposed to be
I'm living like ash, we're sleeping with the enemy
ko: 재처럼 살아가고, 적과 함께 자고 있어

en: How do we reverse the chemistry? I don't want us to be the enemy
ko: 어떻게 화학 반응을 되돌릴 수 있을까? 우리는 적이 되고 싶지 않아

en: This love is taking all of my energy Energy, energy
ko: 이 사랑은 내 모든 에너지를 빼앗아가 Energy, energy

en: It's taking all of my energy Energy, energy
ko: 내 모든 에너지를 빼앗아가 Energy, energy

en: It's taking all of my energy
Lonely like yesterday, not even gravity
Could keep your feet off the ground when you were with me
ko: 네가 나와 함께할 때 발을 땅에서 떼지 못하게 했어

en: How could you be as one and become so divided now?
ko: 어떻게 하나가 되어 이렇게 나뉘어버릴 수 있지?

en: There's no use hiding from the misery now
Such a mystery, when he's here with me
ko: 그가 나와 함께할 때, 정말 신비로워

en: It's hard to believe I'm still lonely
Chances fading now, patience running out
This ain't how it's supposed to be
